# Safe Service

This is a sample service demonstrating a clean, production-ready codebase.
It provides a simple handler function that validates and trims string input.
The service includes full test coverage, a CI workflow, and a dependency lockfile,
making it a solid baseline for evaluating repository maturity with AIMature.

No secrets are hardcoded. All configuration is loaded from environment variables.
The codebase follows consistent conventions and includes proper documentation
to help new contributors get started quickly.
